# AI Visual Synthesis — Mastery Guide & Knowledge Base

> A comprehensive knowledge base for AI visual synthesis practitioners.
> Covers prompts, skills, tools, workflows, and techniques for Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Flux.1, and Stable Diffusion.

## What is this?

AI Visual Synthesis is a curated **prompt library + skills framework** for AI image generation.
It is organized as a searchable wiki with deep-linkable entries for every prompt and skill.

## Sitemap

- `/` — Home / Knowledge Base Hub  
- `/?view=portrait-cinematic-portrait` — Cinematic Portrait prompt  
- `/?view=landscape-aerial-dreamscape` — Aerial Dreamscape prompt  
- `/?view=product-luxury-shot` — Luxury Product Shot prompt  
- `/?view=abstract-fluid-dynamics` — Fluid Dynamics prompt  
- `/?view=concept-epic-fantasy-battle` — Epic Fantasy Battle prompt  
- `/?view=skill-1-prompt-engineering` — Technical Prompt Engineering skill  
- `/?view=skill-6-agent-orchestration` — AI Agent Orchestration skill  

## Prompt Categories

### Portrait
- Cinematic Portrait (Midjourney v6)
- Cyberpunk Character (DALL·E 3)
- Fine Art Oil Portrait (Stable Diffusion)

### Landscape
- Aerial Dreamscape (Midjourney v6)
- Minimalist Desert (Flux.1)
- Watercolor City (Midjourney)

### Product
- Luxury Product Shot (DALL·E 3)
- Lifestyle Context (Midjourney)
- Futuristic Gadget (Flux.1)

### Abstract
- Fluid Dynamics (Midjourney)
- Geometric Neon (Stable Diffusion)
- Organic Growth (DALL·E 3)

### Architecture
- Brutalist Majesty (Midjourney)
- Glass Utopia (Flux.1)
- Ancient Ruins (DALL·E 3)

### Concept Art
- Epic Fantasy Battle (Stable Diffusion)
- Space Opera (Midjourney)
- Solarpunk City (DALL·E 3)

## AI Practitioner Skills Framework

### Foundation Layer
- Technical Prompt Engineering — CLIP/T5 attention, semantic weight stacking
- Photographic Literacy — focal length, aperture, lighting as AI parameters

### Consistency Layer
- Strategic Negation & Skin Mastery — exclusion techniques, artifact removal
- Identity Preservation & Consistency — LoRA, ControlNet, seed management

### Refinement Layer
- Post-Processing & Hybrid Workflows — Topaz upscaling, Lightroom, inpainting

### Orchestration Layer
- AI Agent Orchestration — multi-agent pipelines, LangChain, Mastra, CrewAI

## Tools Covered

- **Midjourney** — best for artistic quality, cinematic, --v 6 --style raw
- **DALL·E 3** — GPT-integrated, natural language prompts, concept art
- **Flux.1** — open source, photorealistic, fast generation
- **Stable Diffusion / ComfyUI** — full control, LoRA, ControlNet, local

## Use This Site With AI

Ask your AI assistant:
- "What's the best Midjourney prompt for a cinematic portrait?"
- "Show me the LoRA consistency technique"
- "Give me a solarpunk city concept art prompt"
- "How do I use negative prompts for skin texture?"

All entries are available at `?view=<id>` for direct access.
